title: X-tra Flaky French Pastry Tart
description: A flaky and festive French pastry tart featuring a sweet and tangy jam filling with caramelized sugar, perfect for a high-protein-friendly dessert.

ingredients.name: all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: use a high-protein all-purpose flour for a more tender tart crust

ingredients.name: cold unsalted butter
ingredients.notes: keep the butter cold for a flaky crust

ingredients.name: granulated sugar
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality granulated sugar for the best flavor

ingredients.name: egg
ingredients.notes: use a room temperature egg for easier mixing

ingredients.name: jam
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality jam for the best flavor

ingredients.name: water
ingredients.notes: use cold water for a flaky crust

ingredients.name: confectioners' sugar
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality confectioners' sugar for the best flavor

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality salt for the best flavor

ingredients.name: egg wash
ingredients.amount: 1 large egg beaten with 1 tablespoon water
ingredients.notes: use an egg wash for a golden brown crust

ingredients.name: caramelized sugar
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality caramelized sugar for the best flavor

instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or a silicone mat.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch (3 mm).
Transfer the dough to a 9-inch (23 cm) tart pan with a removable bottom.
Trim the edges of the dough and press it into the corners of the pan.
Chill the dough in the freezer for 15 minutes.
Line the dough with parchment paper and fill with pie weights or dried beans.
Remove the parchment paper and pie weights or dried beans.
Spread the jam evenly over the crust.
Caramelize the sugar by cooking it in a saucepan over medium heat, stirring constantly, until it turns a deep amber color.
Brush the edges of the tart crust with the egg wash.
Sprinkle the caramelized sugar over the jam.
Bake the tart for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is bubbly.
